article_meta.title: Christmas travelers left stranded as airports see mass flight cancelations

reasoning: Mixed performance: caught some author-level sensational phrasing but committed an attribution violation by flagging quoted anecdote, used non-standard/incorrect bias labels, and missed additional loaded wording in the author’s prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged a traveler’s quoted anecdote as bias, violating the rule against using quoted source language.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One clear false positive (quoted anecdote) and one debatable item ('tops misery map'); others defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-level loaded terms like 'travel chaos' and 'disastrous rain storm.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels ('Emotional framing', 'Anecdotal bias') and shortened 'Sensationalism' instead of the defined 'Sensationalism/Emotionalism.'
